nodes.label: AI as research assistant for fact-checking and overview
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable source of factual information
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to bring up sources that I can fact check myself against its claims

nodes.label: AI as creative intern for ideation and rewriting
nodes.label_negative: AI as final decision-maker without human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I use it as if it were an intern, where I'll get it to generate content or information that I'll collaborate on it with, with me making the final call

nodes.label: AI alignment with personal tone and style
nodes.label_negative: AI misalignment with desired tone and style
nodes.grounding_span: I like to re-edit the suggestions I receive to ensure they align with my style and tone

nodes.label: Human personal touch in communications
nodes.grounding_span: it's the human/personal touch that makes all the difference in this industry

nodes.label: AI reliability for menial tasks like invoicing
nodes.grounding_span: I can see myself using it more for menial tasks like invoicing etc once it becomes reliable

nodes.label: Epistemic certainty and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I'm still not 100% convinced of AI's ability to produce factual information consistently

nodes.label: Authentic self-expression and personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: I've always prided myself on my command of the English language and general communication skills

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: I can see myself using it more for menial tasks like invoicing etc once it becomes reliable

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for website copy rewriting
nodes.grounding_span: I recall I was pretty happy with some suggestions a LLM made in terms of re-writing/updating our website copy

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for email tone adjustments
nodes.grounding_span: I remember being frustrated when trying to get an LLM to rewrite an email by my prompting it with tone suggestions

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about future AI use for menial tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I can see myself using it more for menial tasks like invoicing etc once it becomes reliable

nodes.label: Firm commitment to human element in communications
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think I'll ever give up the human element for communications

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth refinement with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I'll go back and forth with requests for rephrasing or certain sentences that I'll then incorporate

nodes.label: Domain-specific boundary setting for AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I also don't use AI for any financial stuff
